name: Triage Sentinel — AI-Powered Alert Classification Engine
description: Universal AI alert classification engine. Receives webhook from any alerting tool (PagerDuty, OpsGenie, Datadog, CloudWatch, Prometheus) and classifies severity as P1/P2/P3 in under 3 seconds using deterministic threshold logic enhanced by AI reasoning.
fork_use_cases: Healthcare: EHR system alerts, patient monitoring degradation
Retail: Checkout system failures, payment processor latency
Fintech: Trading API and payment gateway incidents

customization_points.description: Edit P1/P2/P3 threshold values in thresholds.js. Add services to the critical-service multiplier list. Plug in your alerting tool adapter.

readme_first_line: Works with any alerting tool. Plug in your webhook, get AI triage in 3 seconds.
